raw_result.description: API-first B2B data enrichment platform for contact discovery, prospecting, and email verification.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official authentication docs show requests are authenticated with an API key in the `x-api-key` header.
raw_result.gating_reason: Public API docs are available, but first-party pricing is only described as usage-based with sales/contact flow (`Book a Call`) and no clearly self-serve free or trial API access verified from official pages.

api_surface.breadth: Public docs expose multiple REST endpoints for contact finding/enrichment, prospecting, and email verification, plus authentication and rate-limits documentation.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official first-party MCP server or GitHub/MCP documentation link was found on Waterfall.io or docs pages reviewed.

raw_result.blocker: API appears buildable from public REST docs, but obtaining usable access likely requires paid/commercial onboarding or manual contact because self-serve developer signup/trial access was not verified from official evidence.
raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Documentation navigation indicates a dedicated rate limits page, but specific limits were not verified from the available extracted evidence.
raw_result.notable_signals: First-party site highlights usage-based pricing, SOC 2 Type II certification, GDPR/CCPA compliance, and API-first positioning. Documentation appears comprehensive and publicly accessible.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Need human verification of whether Waterfall offers self-serve API keys, free trial access, exact rate-limit values, and whether any official MCP/GitHub presence exists outside the reviewed first-party pages.

result.description: API-first B2B data enrichment platform for contact discovery, prospecting, and email verification.
result.auth_notes: Official authentication docs show requests are authenticated with an API key in the `x-api-key` header.
result.gating_reason: Public API docs are available, but first-party pricing is only described as usage-based with sales/contact flow (`Book a Call`) and no clearly self-serve free or trial API access verified from official pages.

api_surface.breadth: Public docs expose multiple REST endpoints for contact finding/enrichment, prospecting, and email verification, plus authentication and rate-limits documentation.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official first-party MCP server or GitHub/MCP documentation link was found on Waterfall.io or docs pages reviewed.

result.blocker: API appears buildable from public REST docs, but obtaining usable access likely requires paid/commercial onboarding or manual contact because self-serve developer signup/trial access was not verified from official evidence.
result.rate_limit_notes: Documentation navigation indicates a dedicated rate limits page, but specific limits were not verified from the available extracted evidence.
result.notable_signals: First-party site highlights usage-based pricing, SOC 2 Type II certification, GDPR/CCPA compliance, and API-first positioning. Documentation appears comprehensive and publicly accessible.
result.human_review_reason: Need human verification of whether Waterfall offers self-serve API keys, free trial access, exact rate-limit values, and whether any official MCP/GitHub presence exists outside the reviewed first-party pages.
